titleStmt.title: SII 25.185: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 185. (A.R. No. 185 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to about the 13th Century on grounds of palaeography. It does not furnish either the praśasti or the title of the king.

The king is stated to have raised the family of Manu (Manukula) (from its low position) and to have worn the heareditary crown. This indicates the attempts made by the king to regain the territories and to consolidate the kingdom.

It records an undertaking given by the tillers of the dēvadāna lands of the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiyār in Uśākkāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, who agreed to pay one kuṟuṇi of paddy per 1/8th of a chēy as a capital for the maintenance of Tirumāḷigaippiḷḷai, a representative of Irāvaḷa Sōmanādēva-mudaliyār alias Padineṇbhūmi Kārāḷa Kaṟpagappiḷḷaiyār of Seventy-nine nāḍu, who was conducting the services in the temple.
The king may be identified with Rājēndra III on the basis of the inference drawn of his having raised the Manukula and got the fillet of crown.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattika
ḷ maṉukulameṭuttu neṟimuṭi
cūṭiyaruḷiya śrī rācentiracoḻa
tevaṟkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu I
rācentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkara
mpaināṭṭu piramatecamucākkāṉamā
ṉa keraḷakulācaṉiccaruppetimaṅka
lattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭai
yār koyil tevatāṉak kuṭimakkaḷo
m Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil tiruppaṇi ce
y vikkiṟa Eṅkaḷ piḷḷai Irāvaḷaco
maṉāteva mutaliyārāṉa Eḻupattu Onpa
tu nāṭṭu patineṇpūmikārāḷa kaṟappaka pi
ḷḷaiyāṟku nāṅkaḷ vaittu kuṭuttana Ivaṟkkā
ka tiruppaṇi kaṅkāṇiyumāy mutalikaḷukku A
ṭi kiḻumāy niṟkiṟa viḷakkoḷi maṅkala muṭai
yār tirumāḷikaip piḷḷaikku civaṉattukku
Uṭalāka vaittukkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāya
ṉār tevatānattu nāṅkaḷ Uḻukiṟa nilat
tuk kuṭinilacivitam pe(ṟ)ṟuvārum I
nṉāvaṉār teva
tāṉattu paṟ
ṟil Iruntu Uḻu
kiṟa nilaṅkaḷ U
ḻuppaṭi Ivvā
1. Rest of the record is built in.

ṇ(ṭ)ṭu mutal Arai
kkāl ceykku
kuṟuṇiyāka van
ta nellu viḷai
pokan to
ṟum Eṅkaḷ kiḻ
vārattile kuṭukka
kaṭavomākavum
Ippaṭi kuṭātiru
ntārākil virako
ṭi yārai Iṭṭu taṇ
ṭikkoḷḷa kaṭava
tākavum Ippaṭica
ntirātitta val
Ivar peṟakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi camma
tittu Ūrniyokam kuṭuttom
Inṉāyaṉār tevatāṉa kuṭimakkaḷ Om
Ippaṭikaḷ ceyyum miṭattu Iv Irāvaḷa mu
taliyārkku piṉppaṭuvatāṉa Ūrkaḷ
torum vā(c)cal Aṉucarikka pukuntatākkum Itil māḷikai piḷḷai tiṉṟu collic cey
yak kaṭavārākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai perumarutūruṭaiyār comaṉāveḷḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai vikkirama coḻaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu nṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkaṉ kā Uṭaiyāṉ ñāṉacampantaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
Ippaṭikku Ivai vikkiramacoḻa nallūr Uṭaiyār paṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu poṉ (1/2)
Digital edition of SII 25.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
